name: Mac Control MCP
description: Native Swift MCP server with 63 tools for full macOS automation — accessibility tree, Safari/Chrome control, screen capture, OCR, keyboard/mouse, Spotlight, and clipboard.

skills.name: Accessibility Tree
skills.description: Read the full macOS accessibility tree to navigate and interact with any desktop application via MCP

skills.name: Browser Control
skills.description: Control Safari and Chrome natively — navigate, click, type, and extract content without Playwright

skills.name: Screen Capture & OCR
skills.description: Capture screenshots and extract text from any screen region using native macOS OCR engine

skills.name: System Automation
skills.description: Send keyboard shortcuts, mouse clicks, manage clipboard, and trigger Spotlight via MCP tools
